item.title: 代理安全漏洞：54%的企业已经发生过人工智能代理事件，大多数企业仍然让代理共享凭证
item.summary: Across 107 enterprises, AI agents are being given real access to systems and data while the controls meant to contain them lag behind. More than half have already had a confirmed agent security incident or a near-miss; only about a third give every agent its own scoped identity, and most agents still share credentials;
